html:
“Break down some orbs in the mean time.”

-

The Sanctum Smithy is a Crafting Station exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It appears after Keystone is retrieved from Reliquary. It grants access to the Sanctum Smithy Filter while the player stands next to it. Items crafted at the Sanctum Smithy cannot be prototyped.

Craftable Items

  • Portation Orb Fragment
  • Guard Tower Kit

Trivia

  • The Sanctum Smithy was introduced in the Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

Assets

  • Proximity
  • Use

Sanctum Smithy
Object Info
Perk

Miscellaneous
"vault_refiner_pedestal"
“This technology is ancient!”
–Wilson
“Does it have a burn function?”
–Willow
“What will Wolfgang make here?”
–Wolfgang
“What can it make to help us?”
–Wendy
“YOU'VE CHANGED”
–WX-78
“A mill of sorts employed by the ancients.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm sure it's not a table saw.”
–Woodie
“It's powered by ancient magic.”
–Maxwell
“Thöugh battle be my calling, I dö nöt löathe the smith's craft.”
–Wigfrid
“What does it make? Toys?”
–Webber
“It looks like a fancy mixer.”
–Warly
“Make old things”
–Wormwood
“Never seen anything like it, but I'll make it work.”
–Winona
“Be patient! It's ancient!”
–Wortox
“Glurph. Makes old stuff.”
–Wurt
“What should we make, Woby?”
–Walter
“Time to put it to work.”
–Wanda
“Break down some orbs in the mean time.”

The '''Sanctum Smithy''' is a [[Crafting/DST|Crafting Station]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It appears after [[Keystone]] is retrieved from [[Reliquary]]. It grants access to the [[Sanctum Smithy Filter]] while the player stands next to it. Items crafted at the Sanctum Smithy cannot be prototyped.

== Craftable Items ==
{{#lst:Sanctum Smithy Filter|Craftable Items}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Sanctum Smithy was introduced in the [[Cursed Confrontation Part 1]] update.
